mentions.note: Merging with Coterra in all-stock deal; creating 4th largest independent energy producer; strong Delaware Basin positioning; natural gas growth story tied to data center capex boom.
Natural gas portfolio strong post-merger; Cramer agrees stock undervalued but hesitant after oil's big run. Will buy on pullback if it dips.
Caller Tony asking about Coterra merger; Cramer recommends Devon instead; believes hyperscalers will eventually buy natural gas producer; own Devon directly for this thesis.
Natural gas exposure with strong demand backdrop. 'Buy, plain and simple; exactly what you should be buying right here.'
Natural gas story makes Cramer very excited. Beneficiary of energy demand and geopolitical premium.
